practice_description: Generate or reuse a cached static snapshot for a Phema using live Plaza pulse data.

practice_data.name: Snapshot Phema
practice_data.description: Generate or reuse a cached static snapshot for a Phema using live Plaza pulse data.

phema_id.description: Optional Phema id registered on Plaza or preloaded into the agent.

phema_name.description: Optional Phema name when resolving from Plaza or config.

phema.description: Inline Phema payload to snapshot without directory lookup.

params.description: Input parameters forwarded to matching pulsers.

input.description: Alias for params when invoked by other agents.

cache_time.description: Cache lifetime in seconds before regenerating a new static snapshot.
